skill: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
stem:
y = (1/2)x − 7

y = −x + 11

The solution to the given system of equations is (x, y). What is the value of x?
rationale: Setting the right-hand sides equal: (1/2)x − 7 = −x + 11. Adding x to both sides: (3/2)x − 7 = 11, so (3/2)x = 18, giving x = 12.
